narrative:
West Jefferson (precinct in Mercer County) has 853 registered voters, with 50.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.7 percentage points.
